channel.title: Fallthrough
channel.description: A deep and nuanced conversational podcast focused on technology, software, and computing.
channel.itunes:author: Fallthrough Media

item.title: Episode 68: Distributed systems and Go
item.itunes:title: Episode 68: Distributed systems and Go
item.description: Kris and Jamie chat about distributed systems and writing them in Go.
item.author: Fallthrough Media
item.itunes:author: Kris Brandow, Jamie Tanna
item.itunes:summary: Kris and Jamie chat about distributed systems and writing them in Go.
